scripts.android: npm run build && node ./node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor open android
scripts.android:install: npm run build && npx cap sync android && bash -c 'source scripts/android-java-home.sh && cd android && ./gradlew installRelease'
scripts.android:bundle: npm run build && npx cap sync android && bash -c 'source scripts/android-java-home.sh && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease'
scripts.ios: npm run build && node ./node_modules/@capacitor/cli/bin/capacitor open ios
